name: io.github.KuvopLLC/purroxy2
description: Record what you do on any website. Securely automate it forever. Purroxy replays your recorded browser actions as MCP tools.

tools.name: purroxy_list_capabilities
tools.description: List all recorded capabilities available for replay

tools.name: purroxy_run_capability
tools.description: Replay a recorded browser capability with parameters and extract results

tools.name: purroxy_get_status
tools.description: Check if Purroxy is running and connected

tools.name: purroxy_login
tools.description: Open a site in the secure browser for login and session capture

tools.name: purroxy_record
tools.description: Start recording a new browser capability from user actions

tools.name: purroxy_extract_data
tools.description: Extract structured data from a page using CSS selectors
